response.justification: A deeply experienced full-stack engineer (15+ years) with strong TypeScript/Node.js, cloud (AWS CDK), and recent hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which maps well to the agentic/MCP focus of this role. However, the resume shows only ~1 year of explicitly AI-focused work and no concrete evidence of the JD's core requirements: RAG architectures, vector databases, production GenAI delivery, Python, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI. The Staff title and customer-facing/mentoring signals are present, but the 8+ years of production AI experience cannot be substantiated.
strengths: Current Staff-level role building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, directly relevant to agentic workflows
Strong TypeScript/Node.js and cloud (AWS CDK) experience plus scaling/low-latency systems background
Long track record of mentoring, workshops, and technical leadership across many teams
concerns: No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM optimization experience
Only ~1 year of explicitly AI work, far short of the required 8+ years of production AI
Python not listed in skills; multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI) absent

key_factors.factor: Insufficient years of production AI experience
